svg.title: Two different internal states — calm and under stress — converge on one identical, polished output. Only the new training-time read can tell them apart.

text.font-family: DM Sans, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif
DM Sans, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: WHAT EVERYONE ALREADY SAW — THE OUTPUT

svg.text: Two different insides, one identical result. Watching only the output can’t tell them apart.

text.font-family: DM Sans, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Training can now watch whether a worker was calm or straining — and adjust before that worker reaches you.
